# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Description: Custom user authentication plugin with secure password handling
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Custom_User_Authentication {
    
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_registration'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_login'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_logout'));
        add_shortcode('custom_registration_form', array($this, 'registration_form'));
        add_shortcode('custom_login_form', array($this, 'login_form'));
    }
    
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id mediumint(9) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(60) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Custom Auth',
            'Custom Auth',
            'manage_options',
            'custom-auth',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-lock',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function admin_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        if (isset($_POST['delete_user']) && check_admin_referer('delete_custom_user')) {
            $user_id = intval($_POST['user_id']);
            $wpdb->delete($this->table_name, array('id' => $user_id), array('%d'));
            echo '<div class="notice notice-success"><p>User deleted successfully.</p></div>';
        }
        
        $users = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT id, username, email, created_at FROM {$this->table_name} ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>Custom User Authentication</h1>
            
            <h2>Registered Users</h2>
            <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>ID</th>
                        <th>Username</th>
                        <th>Email</th>
                        <th>Created At</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if ($users): ?>
                        <?php foreach ($users as $user): ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($user->id); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($user->username); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($user->email); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($user->created_at); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <form method="post" style="display:inline;">
                                        <?php wp_nonce_field('delete_custom_user'); ?>
                                        <input type="hidden" name="user_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr($user->id); ?>">
                                        <input type="submit" name="delete_user" value="Delete" class="button button-small" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure?');">
                                    </form>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php else: ?>
                        <tr>
                            <td colspan="5">No users found.</td>
                        </tr>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
            
            <h2>Shortcodes</h2>
            <p><code>[custom_registration_form]</code> - Display registration form</p>
            <p><code>[custom_login_form]</code> - Display login form</p>
        </div>
        <?php
    }
    
    public function hash_password($password) {
        return password_hash($password, PASSWORD_BCRYPT, array('cost' => 12));
    }
    
    public function verify_password($password, $hash) {
        return password_verify($password, $hash);
    }
    
    public function register_user($username, $email, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_user($username);
        $email = sanitize_email($email);
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'All fields are required.');
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid email address.');
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 6) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Password must be at least 6 characters long.');
        }
        
        $existing_username = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s",
            $username
        ));
        
        if ($existing_username > 0) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username already exists.');
        }
        
        $existing_email = $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE email = %s",
            $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing_email > 0) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Email already exists.');
        }
        
        $hashed_password = $this->hash_password($password);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password' => $hashed_password
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result) {
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Registration successful!');
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Registration failed. Please try again.');
        }
    }
    
    public function authenticate_user($username, $password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_user($username);
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Username and password are required.');
        }
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username,
            $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password.');
        }
        
        if ($this->verify_password($password, $user->password)) {
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            $_SESSION['custom_user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['custom_username'] = $user->username;
            $_SESSION['custom_email'] = $user->email;
            
            return array('success' => true, 'message' => 'Login successful!', 'user' => $user);
        } else {
            return array('success' => false, 'message' => 'Invalid username or password.');
        }
    }
    
    public function is_user_logged_in() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        return isset($_SESSION['custom_user_id']);
    }
    
    public function get_current_user() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            return array(
                'id' => $_SESSION['custom_user_id'],
                'username' => $_SESSION['custom_username'],
                'email' => $_SESSION['custom_email']
            );
        }
        return null;
    }
    
    public function logout_user() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        unset($_SESSION['custom_user_id']);
        unset($_SESSION['custom_username']);
        unset($_SESSION['custom_email']);
        session_destroy();
    }
    
    public function handle_registration() {
        if (isset($_POST['custom_register']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['custom_register_nonce'], 'custom_register_action')) {
            $username = $_POST['username'];
            $email = $_POST['email'];
            $password = $_POST['password'];
            $confirm_password = $_POST['confirm_password'];
            
            if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
                $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'error', 'message' => 'Passwords do not match.');
                return;
            }
            
            $result = $this->register_user($username, $email, $password);
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            
            if ($result['success']) {
                $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'success', 'message' => $result['message']);
            } else {
                $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'error', 'message' => $result['message']);
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_login() {
        if (isset($_POST['custom_login']) && wp_verify_nonce($_POST['custom_login_nonce'], 'custom_login_action')) {
            $username = $_POST['username'];
            $password = $_POST['password'];
            
            $result = $this->authenticate_user($username, $password);
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            
            if ($result['success']) {
                $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'success', 'message' => $result['message']);
                
                if (isset($_POST['redirect_to']) && !empty($_POST['redirect_to'])) {
                    wp_redirect($_POST['redirect_to']);
                    exit;
                }
            } else {
                $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'error', 'message' => $result['message']);
            }
        }
    }
    
    public function handle_logout() {
        if (isset($_GET['custom_logout']) && wp_verify_nonce($_GET['_wpnonce'], 'custom_logout_action')) {
            $this->logout_user();
            
            if (!session_id()) {
                session_start();
            }
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'] = array('type' => 'success', 'message' => 'Logged out successfully.');
            
            wp_redirect(home_url());
            exit;
        }
    }
    
    public function registration_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        $message = '';
        if (isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message'])) {
            $msg = $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'];
            $message = '<div class="custom-auth-message custom-auth-' . esc_attr($msg['type']) . '">' . esc_html($msg['message']) . '</div>';
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']);
        }
        
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            $user = $this->get_current_user();
            $logout_url = wp_nonce_url(add_query_arg('custom_logout', '1'), 'custom_logout_action');
            return $message . '<p>You are already logged in as ' . esc_html($user['username']) . '. <a href="' . esc_url($logout_url) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-registration-form">
            <?php echo $message; ?>
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('custom_register_action', 'custom_register_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username *</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="email">Email *</label>
                    <input type="email" name="email" id="email" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password *</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="confirm_password">Confirm Password *</label>
                    <input type="password" name="confirm_password" id="confirm_password" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="custom_register" value="Register">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        
        <style>
            .custom-registration-form label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; }
            .custom-registration-form input[type="text"],
            .custom-registration-form input[type="email"],
            .custom-registration-form input[type="password"] { width: 100%; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
            .custom-registration-form input[type="submit"] { padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; }
            .custom-auth-message { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 3px; }
            .custom-auth-success { background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; }
            .custom-auth-error { background-color: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; }
        </style>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function login_form() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
        
        $message = '';
        if (isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message'])) {
            $msg = $_SESSION['custom_auth_message'];
            $message = '<div class="custom-auth-message custom-auth-' . esc_attr($msg['type']) . '">' . esc_html($msg['message']) . '</div>';
            unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_message']);
        }
        
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            $user = $this->get_current_user();
            $logout_url = wp_nonce_url(add_query_arg('custom_logout', '1'), 'custom_logout_action');
            return $message . '<p>Welcome, ' . esc_html($user['username']) . '! <a href="' . esc_url($logout_url) . '">Logout</a></p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-login-form">
            <?php echo $message; ?>
            <form method="post" action="">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('custom_login_action', 'custom_login_nonce'); ?>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="username">Username or Email *</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="username" required>
                </p>
                
                <p>
                    <label for="password">Password *</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="password" required>
                </p>
                
                <input type="hidden" name="redirect_to" value="<?php echo esc_url($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']); ?>">
                
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" name="custom_login" value="Login">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        
        <style>
            .custom-login-form label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; }
            .custom-login-form input[type="text"],
            .custom-login-form input[type="password"] { width: 100%; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 10px; }
            .custom-login-form input[type="submit"] { padding: 10px 20px; cursor: pointer; }
            .custom-auth-message { padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; border-radius: 3px; }
            .custom-auth-success { background-color: #d4edda; color: #155724; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; }
            .custom-auth-error { background-color: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; }
        </style>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
}

new Custom_User_Authentication();
